title: Roguecraft BetterCombat compat
description:
adds bettercombat animations to roguecraft scythes. if MonoCode wants me to take this down or something else, i will.

credit to monocode i guess
body:
resourcepack that adds BetterCombat scythe animations to Roguecraft scythe.
modifies scythe model to have BetterCombat scythe as a parent


update: if i manage to get 5 dollars off of ad revenue, ill update it to the latest version and add Roguecraft Plus support!

update: nvm ill do it anyways

**_PLS DONT USE ADBLOCKER!!!_**

this is like the first money ive ever made!!!!!!!!!!!!
